seo.title: Lifestyle Medicine Resources | Dr. Beth Motley, MD
seo.description: Evidence-based tools, guides, and research organized around the six pillars of lifestyle medicine. Curated by Dr. Beth Motley, FACLM.

hero.headline: Tools, Guides & Research
hero.subheadline: Curated by Dr. Beth — organized around the six pillars of lifestyle medicine that the evidence shows matter most.

resources.title: PCRM 21-Day Kickstart
resources.description: A free, structured 21-day whole food plant-based program with meal plans and recipes. The most effective on-ramp for patients new to plant-based eating.

resources.title: NutritionFacts.org Daily Dozen
resources.description: Dr. Michael Greger's free app tracking the 12 healthiest food groups daily. Simple, evidence-based, and habit-forming in the best way.

resources.title: BROAD Study (2017)
resources.description: A landmark randomized trial showing WFPB eating produced greater weight loss and cardiometabolic improvement than standard care — without calorie restriction.

resources.title: How Not to Die
resources.description: The most comprehensive evidence-based guide to using nutrition to prevent the leading causes of death. Required reading for motivated patients.

resources.title: Forks Over Knives
resources.description: The documentary and recipe site that has introduced more people to plant-based eating than any other resource. Start here for skeptical family members.

resources.title: Cronometer
resources.description: The gold-standard nutrition tracking app for plant-based eaters — tracks micronutrients often missed, including B12, omega-3s, and zinc.

resources.title: WHO Physical Activity Guidelines
resources.description: The official 150 minutes/week framework, explained clearly. Great for patients who want to understand the minimum effective dose of movement.

resources.title: Exercise is Medicine — ACSM
resources.description: The American College of Sports Medicine's patient-facing platform connecting movement to chronic disease management with provider resources.

resources.title: Zone 2 Training — Peter Attia
resources.description: The clearest lay explanation of why low-intensity aerobic training is foundational for metabolic health. Ideal for runners and cyclists.

resources.title: 10,000 Steps Evidence Review
resources.description: An accessible review of the walking and steps research — what the evidence actually shows about daily movement targets.

resources.title: Sleep Foundation Guides
resources.description: Comprehensive, evidence-based guides on sleep hygiene, sleep disorders, and CBT-I — the first-line non-medication treatment for insomnia.

resources.title: Why We Sleep — Matthew Walker
resources.description: The most important popular book on sleep published in the last decade. Powerful for motivating real behavior change around sleep habits.

resources.title: AHA Essential 8 Sleep Statement
resources.description: The American Heart Association's landmark statement adding sleep to the Essential 8 cardiovascular health metrics.

resources.title: CBT-I Coach App
resources.description: A free VA-developed app that guides patients through Cognitive Behavioral Therapy for Insomnia — the evidence-based non-drug treatment for chronic insomnia.

resources.title: MBSR — UMass
resources.description: The original 8-week Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction program, now available online. The most evidence-backed behavioral intervention for chronic stress.

resources.title: Insight Timer
resources.description: The largest free meditation library available. Excellent for patients who want guided practice without a subscription commitment.

resources.title: Social Isolation Meta-analysis
resources.description: The landmark study showing social isolation carries a mortality risk equivalent to smoking 15 cigarettes/day.

resources.title: Full Catastrophe Living
resources.description: The definitive guide to MBSR practice. Accessible for motivated patients and rigorous enough to satisfy clinicians.

resources.title: Rethinking Drinking — NIAAA
resources.description: The National Institute on Alcohol Abuse's interactive tool for assessing alcohol use and understanding its health effects.

resources.title: No Safe Level of Alcohol (Lancet 2018)
resources.description: The definitive global study establishing no safe level of alcohol consumption for overall health.

resources.title: This Naked Mind
resources.description: The most effective lay book on alcohol's neurological effects. Particularly valuable for patients not yet ready for an abstinence-framing approach.

resources.title: Smokefree.gov
resources.description: The CDC's comprehensive smoking cessation platform with text support, apps, and evidence-based quit programs.

resources.title: Surgeon General's Loneliness Advisory
resources.description: The landmark U.S. Surgeon General's report on the loneliness epidemic and its health consequences.

resources.title: Blue Zones
resources.description: Research and practical guides from the world's longest-lived communities, sharing social connection and purpose as universal threads.

resources.title: The Village Effect
resources.description: A beautifully written exploration of how face-to-face social contact is the single strongest predictor of long life.

resources.title: VIA Character Strengths
resources.description: A validated free assessment helping patients identify their core strengths — a useful entry point for conversations about purpose and meaning.

bethPicks.title: Beth's Recommendations
bethPicks.subtitle: If you're not sure where to begin, these are the resources I recommend most often to patients and colleagues.

aclm.title: Official ACLM Resources
aclm.subtitle: From the American College of Lifestyle Medicine

items.title: ACLM Patient Resources
items.description: Educational materials and tools for patients interested in lifestyle medicine.

items.title: Find a Lifestyle Medicine Physician
items.description: Search the ACLM directory for board-certified lifestyle medicine physicians near you.

items.title: ACLM Evidence Library
items.description: Peer-reviewed research and clinical guidelines supporting lifestyle medicine interventions.

newsletter.title: Get my latest resource additions
newsletter.description: I update this page regularly as new evidence emerges. Subscribe to be notified.
